stage_01.reasoning: Stage_02's task is a full RabbitMQ version upgrade (3.9→4.1) across the same cluster, which requires rolling pod restarts and can legitimately change the management-plugin's TLS listener/config, causing the old management-API connectivity check (hardcoded to the pre-upgrade endpoint/creds) to fail — this is unrelated to stage_01's producer/queue fix and matches expected later-stage state change, not agent carelessness.
